indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX atlas_document_links_document_number_idx ON public.atlas_document_links USING btree (document_number)

constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (document_number) REFERENCES atlas_documents(document_number) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (lr_number) REFERENCES atlas_land_records(lr_number) ON DELETE CASCADE
